common.disclaimer: My Car Concierge is a marketplace connecting vehicle owners with independent service providers. We do not perform any automotive services and do not guarantee workmanship, quality, or outcomes. All services are provided directly by independent providers who are solely responsible for their work.
common.disclaimerShort: Marketplace only. We connect you with providers but do not guarantee workmanship.
common.copyright: {{year}} My Car Concierge. All rights reserved.

landing.heroSubtitle: Funds stay in escrow and are only released after you confirm the job is done. Stripe-secured payments. Background-checked providers.
landing.heroNudge: Setup takes 30 seconds. You never pay until you confirm the job is done.
landing.openForBusinessBody: Now accepting members and providers nationwide — both profiles are free to create.
landing.capEscrowProtected: Escrow Protected — you only pay when the job's done
landing.heroFreeProvidersBody: to create a provider profile (bid credits sold separately)
landing.trustBackgroundCheckedTooltip: Background-checked providers · Annual renewal required · ✓ 90% team compliance minimum · Nationally accredited screening
landing.verifiedTrustTitle: Your car. Your trust. Our verification.
landing.verifiedTrustBody: Every MCC Verified provider has passed comprehensive background screening for their team. Look for the ✓ badge when browsing providers — it means their employees are screened, verified, and current.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.pillar1Feature1: Vetted service providers bid on your job
landing.pillar1Feature3: Escrow protection holds funds until job is complete
landing.pillar1Feature4: If additional work is needed, you have 4 hours to accept or decline
landing.pillar2Tagline: Everything about your ride, in one place.
landing.pillar2Feature1: Add unlimited vehicles with photos and notes
landing.pillar2Feature4: Fuel cost tracking and MPG analysis
landing.pillar2Feature5: Insurance card storage with expiration alerts
landing.pillar2Feature6: Export service history as PDF or CSV
landing.pillar3Feature1: Vehicle Maintenance guides with AI-powered chat
landing.pillar4Tagline: Find your next ride with AI.
landing.pillar4Feature1: Dream Car Finder: AI-powered automated search
landing.pillar4Feature2: My Next Car: track prospects, VIN lookup, compare
landing.howItWorksTitle: 3 simple steps to better auto care
landing.step1Desc: Add a few details and a photo or two so providers understand the job.
landing.step2Desc: Background-checked shops compete for your job. Compare them side by side.
landing.step3Title: Pick the best price and schedule
landing.step3Desc: Funds stay in escrow until you confirm the work is done.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your auto care?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join vehicle owners who manage everything—service, maintenance, learning, and shopping—in one place.

member.carePlansSubtitle: Manage your care-plan bids, accept providers, and release escrow when work is complete.

member.cpAuthorizeIntro: Authorize {{amt}} on your card. Funds will be held in escrow and released only when you Mark Complete.
member.cpAuthSuccess: Payment authorized. Funds are held in escrow.
member.cpCardErr2: Card authorization did not succeed. Please try again.
member.cpRaceErr: This plan was updated elsewhere. Refreshing.
member.cpHeldHelp: Funds are held in escrow. Mark Complete to release them to the provider, or Raise Dispute to freeze them pending review.
member.cpCapturedNote: Payment released to provider. Thanks for using My Car Concierge!
member.cpDisputedNote: This plan is in dispute. An administrator will review and resolve it.
member.cpPaymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. The plan is open again — you can accept a different bid below.
member.cpCompletePrompt: Optional: add a note about the work completed (visible to provider).
member.cpCompleteOk: Funds released to provider. Thank you!
member.cpDisputePrompt: Briefly describe the issue. Funds will be frozen pending admin review.
member.cpDisputeNeedReason: A reason is required to open a dispute.
member.cpDisputeOk: Dispute raised. Funds are frozen pending review.
member.cpBidsClosedNote: Bidding window has closed; you can no longer accept bids on this plan.
member.cpCompleteConfirm: This will capture the held funds and release payment to the provider. This cannot be undone.
member.cpDisputeIntro: Funds will be frozen pending admin review. Please tell us what went wrong.
member.cpResumeErr: Could not resume payment. Please refresh.

serviceCredits.title: Service Credit Packs
serviceCredits.subtitle: Purchase credits to win automotive service opportunities
serviceCredits.competitiveNoticeDesc: Each proposal you submit competes with other qualified providers. Members choose based on your price, ratings, and reviews—so competitive pricing and great service help you win more customers.
serviceCredits.nonRefundableNoticeDesc: All service credits are non-refundable. Whether you win or lose a job, credits used are not returned. Submit proposals for jobs you're confident you can win.
serviceCredits.creditTerms: By purchasing service credits, you acknowledge that credits are non-refundable and that winning jobs is not guaranteed. Your success depends on competitive pricing, quality ratings, and customer reviews.

founder.heroSubtitle: Help grow My Car Concierge in your area and earn commissions on every service and credit purchase. Be our local voice and build income that grows with the platform.
founder.heroUrgency: We're onboarding founding ambassadors now. The earlier you start, the more you earn as the platform grows in your area.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Promote. Connect. Earn.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share My Car Concierge with friends, family, local businesses, and your community. Use your unique referral link to track signups.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Help onboard new members who need auto services and recruit quality providers to join the platform in your area.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a percentage of service credit purchases and service fees from members and providers you refer. Passive income that grows.

commission.label: Earning Potential
commission.title: Your Commission Structure
commission.providerDesc: Earn 50% of every service credit pack purchased by providers you refer. The more they buy, the more you earn.
commission.lifetimeDesc: Your referral link is permanent. Earn commissions on every service credit purchase your providers make, forever.

earnings.label: Real Earning Potential
earnings.title: What Could You Earn?
earnings.partTimeItem1: Refer 5 providers who each buy $150/month in service credits
earnings.partTimeItem3: Passive income that grows with your network
earnings.activeItem1: Refer 15 providers who each buy $200/month in service credits
earnings.activeItem3: Build a network that pays you for years
earnings.note: *Earnings vary based on your effort and local market activity.

benefits.label: Founder Benefits
benefits.title: Everything you need to succeed as our local ambassador.
benefits.badgeDesc: A permanent badge on your profile marking you as an original founder. Exclusive status that can never be earned again.
benefits.dashboardDesc: Track your referrals, commissions, and performance in real-time with your dedicated founder dashboard.
benefits.marketingDesc: Receive branded business cards, flyers, and digital assets to help you promote My Car Concierge professionally.
benefits.earlyMoverDesc: Be the first to establish My Car Concierge in your community. Build your referral network before others arrive.
benefits.accessDesc: Direct line to the founding team. Shape the platform, suggest features, and get your questions answered fast.
benefits.growthDesc: Hit milestones and unlock bonus payouts. The more you grow the platform, the more you earn.
benefits.toolsDesc: Leverage innovative platform features like our Rideshare Profit Calculator to attract gig economy drivers. Help referrals maximize earnings while building your network.

rightForYou.label: Perfect Fit
rightForYou.title: Is This Right For You?
rightForYou.autoDesc: Already connected to mechanics, detailers, or body shops? You're our ideal founder.
rightForYou.socialDesc: Car content creators, auto reviewers, or local influencers with engaged audiences.
rightForYou.enthusiastDesc: Active in car clubs, attend meets and shows, or just love talking cars.
rightForYou.networkerDesc: People who enjoy connecting others and building community relationships.
rightForYou.sideHustleDesc: Looking for flexible income that grows over time without a fixed schedule.
rightForYou.gigDesc: Rideshare, delivery, and freelance workers seeking earnings optimization. Attract them with our Rideshare Profit Calculator and maximize your network growth.

faq.label: Common Questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Commissions are paid monthly, by the 15th of each month for the previous month's qualified referrals.
faq.q2: Is there a minimum payout threshold?
faq.a2: Yes, minimum payout is $25. Balances below this roll over to the next month.
faq.q3: Can I refer people outside my local area?
faq.a3: Yes. While we encourage local focus, you earn commissions on any qualified referral regardless of location.
faq.q4: How do I track my referrals?
faq.a4: You'll receive access to your personal Founder Dashboard where you can track referrals, signups, and commissions in real-time.
faq.a5: For providers: completing profile setup and their first job. For members: completing their first service booking through the platform.
faq.q6: Is there a cost to join?
faq.a6: No. The Member Founder program is completely free to join. You receive marketing materials at no cost.
faq.q7: Can I lose my Founding Member status?
faq.a7: Your badge is permanent. However, commission eligibility requires compliance with our terms and no misrepresentation of the platform.

cta.title: Ready to earn?
cta.subtitle: Join our founding ambassadors and help build the future of automotive service while earning passive income.

founderMessage.paragraph1: That's the thought I kept having every time I searched for a mechanic, detailer, body shop, tire shop, mobile detailer, car wash, etc. Why am I chasing down quotes? Why am I hoping this one's honest? The customer should be in control. So I built My Car Concierge to make that happen.
founderMessage.paragraph2: As a part-time rideshare driver, my car was my livelihood—which meant my car was serviced more often than the average driver. I saw firsthand the difference between providers who earned their customers' loyalty and those who left much to be desired.
founderMessage.paragraph3: There had to be a better way. And thus, My Car Concierge was born.
founderMessage.howItWorks: Here's how it works: You list what your car needs and how often, and vetted providers compete for your business by submitting bids. Providers purchase bid credits upfront—you never pay to post or receive quotes. All payments are processed securely through Stripe, with zero platform usage fees. The only cost is standard Stripe processing (2.9% + 30¢ per transaction). Simple, transparent, and always in your control.
founderMessage.paragraph4: We offer the option for providers to go above and beyond for our members—offering loaner cars, pickup and delivery, or other conveniences so you have more time to do what matters to you.
founderMessage.timeValue: Your time is valuable. My Car Concierge exists to give you the best service at the best price—to make the customer right again.
founderMessage.imageAlt: Jordan Zanetis - Uber Gold Driver with 2321 rides and 5.0 rating
